prompt: Detail-focused textile art: 'Thread by Thread' is meticulously embroidered with a rich palette of earthy greens, warm browns, and deep blues. A blend of satin stitch and French knots gives the letters a profound texture against a rustic, hand-woven fabric whose irregularities and tactile quality are highlighted in a close-up perspective.
prompt_refined: A close-up, detail-focused image of textile art. The phrase 'Thread by Thread' is meticulously embroidered onto a rustic, hand-woven fabric. The embroidery features a rich palette of earthy greens, warm browns, and deep blues, employing a blend of satin stitch and French knots to give the letters a profound texture. The natural irregularities and tactile quality of the underlying fabric are prominently highlighted in this close-up perspective.
